revision.comment: per edit request on talk page - update text
1 revision imported: mass importing wikipedia templates
doing this to force an update since the ambox redirect is messing with things
revision.text: {{ {{{|safesubst:}}}#invoke:Unsubst||date=__DATE__ |$B= <!--{{Unreliable sources}} begin-->{{Ambox | name = Unreliable sources | subst = <includeonly>{{subst:substcheck}}</includeonly> | type = content | small = {{{small|}}} | class = ambox-unreliable_sources | image = [[File:Text document with red question mark.svg|50x40px]] | issue = {{yesno|{{{some|yes}}}|yes=Some|no=All}} of this {{{1|article}}}'s [[Wikipedia:citing sources|listed sources]] '''may not be [[Wikipedia:Reliable sources|reliable]]'''. {{#ifeq:{{{imdb|}}}|yes|It includes attribution to IMDb, which may not be a reliable source for information.}} | fix = Please help improve this article by looking for better, more reliable sources. Unreliable citations may be challenged and removed. | date = {{{date|}}} | cat = Articles lacking reliable references | all = All articles lacking reliable references |removalnotice = yes }}<!--{{Unreliable sources}} end--> }}<noinclude>{{Documentation}}</noinclude> [[Category:Ambox transclusions]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
